title: pericallis cruenta
intro: Pericallis cruenta, also known as the bloody knight or Cape Knight, is a flowering plant species in the family Campanulaceae. This plant is native to the Azores and Madeira islands, and it has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. Pericallis cruenta is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to reduce pain and swelling, and promote wound healing. It can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, and is said to have health benefits including reducing fever, and soothing sore throats.
